children.text: the right to petition the Government for the redress of grievances;
the right to express a personal opinion; or

children.heading: Prohibition of activities
children.label: b Prohibition of activities
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prohibit, or to authorize any court to prohibit, lobbying activities or lobbying contacts by any person or entity, regardless of whether such person or entity is in compliance with the requirements of this chapter.

children.heading: Audit and investigations
children.label: c Audit and investigations
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to grant general audit or investigative authority to the Secretary of the Senate or the Clerk of the House of Representatives.
